title: DBMS Support
text: DBMS Support Uniface enables applications to connect to a wide variety of data sources, including relational databases, files, or directory servers. For example, an application could connect to an Oracle database, files on a server, and an LDAP server. Database connectors provide the interface between Uniface and specific databases The documentation in this collection describes how Uniface handles database I/O and includes the documentation for all the DBMS connectors Uniface provides. Related Links Data Copy Facility Uniface enables you to copy and convert your application data to and from different formats, including XML files and other databases. Was this topic helpful?
